title: Static Options
description: Sync options and keybinds across game instances.
body:
# Static Options
A simple Fabric, Forge, NeoForge, and Quilt mod to sync options and keybinds across game instances.

The default static options path is OS dependent, however, it should be the default Minecraft install location:
- Windows: ```%AppData%/.minecraft```
- Mac: ```$Home/Library/Application Support/minecraft```
- Linux: ```$Home/.minecraft```

On NeoForge versions 1.21.5+, you can define a custom location to read and write to within the mod's config.
# Compatibility
Currently, this mod works for all versions 1.13.2+, however, there is no guarantee this will always be true. If a version is incompatible, please report an issue to the tracker.

Feel free to request backports and features on the tracker as well.
